eventMetadata.context_description: Entering the final round of the ONEflight Myrtle Beach Classic at Dunes Golf and Beach Club, Mark Hubbard holds a one-shot lead at 16-under par after a bogey-free 64 in Round 3, highlighted by birdies on four of his last five holes, surging past early leaders. Aaron Rai sits second at 15-under, with Kevin Roy third at 14-under, and Mac Meissner, Beau Hossler, and Brandt Snedeker tied for fourth at 13-under on this par-71 layout. Five-time major winner Brooks Koepka, the pre-tournament favorite, ties for seventh at 11-under following a strong back-nine 29, positioning him for a potential charge. Leaders tee off at 12:50 p.m. ET amid mild weather in this $4 million opposite-field PGA Tour event, where recent momentum, course history, and Sunday pressure will determine top-5 finishers amid a competitive but non-signature field.

eventMetadata.context_description: With the Truist Championship final round in progress at Quail Hollow Club, Alex Fitzpatrick and Kristoffer Reitan share the lead at 13-under thru four holes after R3 surges of 64 apiece, while Cameron Young's 63—building on his Cadillac Championship victory—positions him two back at 11-under. A thinned 72-player signature event field, impacted by pre-tournament withdrawals from Scottie Scheffler, Collin Morikawa, and Jake Knapp, elevates consistent ball-strikers like Sungjae Im (-12), Tommy Fleetwood, Rickie Fowler, and Patrick Cantlay into top-10 contention. Rory McIlroy and Viktor Hovland sit safely inside top 20 at five-under after strong Sunday starts, but Quail Hollow's tough Green Mile (holes 16-18) and potential late charges from finished players like Min Woo Lee (-7) could shuffle top-20 spots amid stabilizing weather. Trader sentiment hinges on R4 momentum and course history in this $20 million FedExCup event.

markets.question: Game 2: Both Teams Slay a Dragon?
markets.description:
This market is about whether both teams slay at least one elemental dragon during Game 2. In League of Legends, elemental dragons (Infernal, Mountain, Ocean, Hextech, Chemtech, and Cloud) spawn in the dragon pit starting at 5:00 game time. After being slain, the next dragon spawns 5 minutes later. Once a team claims the Dragon Soul (by slaying four dragons), all subsequent dragon spawns become Elder Dragons.

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both Karmine Corp and GIANTX each slay at least one elemental dragon during Game 2. This market will resolve to "No" if either team (or both teams) does not slay any elemental dragon during Game 2. Only elemental dragons count toward this market — Elder Dragon kills do not count.

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 is not played because the series result has already been determined (e.g., a team clinches the series before Game 2 is needed), this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 begins but is not completed and ends via surrender, this market will resolve based on whether both teams had slain at least one elemental dragon prior to stoppage. If the condition was not met, this market will resolve to "No".

If Game 2 is remade, resolution will be based on the remade game only.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://gol.gg/esports/home. However, if https://gol.gg/esports/home has not published final results within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

events.title: LoL: Karmine Corp vs GIANTX (BO3) - LEC Regular Season
events.description:
This market refers to the LoL match between Karmine Corp and GIANTX in the LEC Regular Season, initially scheduled for May 10 at 9:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Karmine Corp" if Karmine Corp win the match against GIANTX.

This market will resolve to "GIANTX" if GIANTX win the match against Karmine Corp.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://gol.gg/esports/home. However, if https://gol.gg/esports/home has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

In cases where a team’s listed name includes minor discrepancies from the resolution source, this market will resolve based on the underlying real-world match rather than exact name matching. Recognizable abbreviations, alternate or erroneous spellings, sponsor tags, affiliate or academy designations, regional identifiers, and minor formatting differences will be treated as referring to the same team, provided the intended team can be clearly and uniquely identified within the relevant competition. If a listed team name has no reasonable connection to any participating team, or if it matches or could reasonably refer to another team in the same competition such that the intended team cannot be unambiguously determined, this market will resolve 50-50.

eventMetadata.context_description: Karmine Corp enters their LEC Spring regular season BO3 against GIANTX as the top-ranked team with a 7-1 series record and seven-game win streak, fresh off a 2-1 victory over Movistar KOI 12 hours ago that solidified their playoff positioning. GIANTX, mired mid-table at around 5-4, suffered a 0-2 whitewash by G2 Esports recently, extending their inconsistency despite a modest one-game streak. KC dominates head-to-head (12-4 overall, 75% win rate), powered by Canna's top lane stability, Yike's jungle aggression, and Caliste's ADC carry potential in early-mid skirmishes under Patch 26.9's objective-focused meta. GIANTX's Madrid home crowd and bot lane synergies offer upset potential, but KC's roster depth and momentum reflect trader consensus for a competitive yet favored series outcome.

markets.question: Gabriel Strefezza: Anytime Goalscorer
markets.description: In the upcoming Serie A game between Parma Calcio 1913 and AS Roma, scheduled for May 10, 2026 at 12:00 PM ET: This market will resolve to "Yes" if Gabriel Strefezza is credited with a goal in the official box score within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No". Own goals do not count. If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve "50-50". If the player is listed as inactive or otherwise does not play, the market will resolve "No". The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 24 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: Parma Calcio 1913 vs. AS Roma - Player Props
events.description: Goal scorers for the Serie A game between Parma Calcio 1913 and AS Roma, scheduled for May 10, 2026 at 12:00 PM ET.

eventMetadata.context_description: With Roma sitting fifth in Serie A standings on 64 points after 35 matches, chasing a tight Champions League spot just behind Juventus, they face mid-table Parma (12th, 42 points) at Stadio Ennio Tardini on May 10 amid key absences impacting player props. Roma's Artem Dovbyk (thigh), Evan Ferguson (ankle), and captain Lorenzo Pellegrini (thigh) are out, shifting reliance to Donyell Malen (11 goals, 24 shots on target) and Paulo Dybala (1.3 SOT per match) for goals and shots overs, while Matias Soulé (5 assists) eyes creators markets. Parma's low-scoring form (0.71 goals per game, recent 0-2 loss to Inter Milan) favors Mateo Pellegrino props (8 goals), but their defense (1.20 conceded) and Roma's head-to-head dominance (14 wins to 3) bolster Giallorossi's attack despite injuries.

markets.question: Game 2: Both Teams Destroy Inhibitors?
markets.description:
This market is about whether both teams destroy at least one enemy inhibitor during Game 2. In League of Legends, each team has three inhibitors (one in each lane), located behind the inner turrets.

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both Karmine Corp and GIANTX each destroy at least one enemy inhibitor during Game 2. This market will resolve to "No" if either team (or both teams) do not destroy any enemy inhibitors.

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 is not played because the series result has already been determined (e.g., a team clinches the series before Game 2 is needed), this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 begins but is not completed and ends via surrender, this market will resolve based on whether both teams destroyed at least one inhibitor prior to stoppage. If the condition was not met, this market will resolve to "No".

If Game 2 is remade, resolution will be based on the remade game only.

markets.question: Will the highest temperature in Shanghai be 31°C or higher on May 11?

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the Shanghai Pudong International Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/cn/shanghai/ZSPD.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

Differentiating factors include cloud cover variability—thicker overcast suppressing solar insolation to favor 26-27°C, while intermittent breaks enabling 28-29°C—as seen in model spreads from ECMWF and GFS analogs. Recent observations show May 10 overcast with highs near 25°C, continuing a mild warming trend above seasonal averages of 24°C. Resolution hinges on Shanghai Pudong Airport measurements; expect updates from CMA overnight.

markets.question: Will US unemployment reach at least 5.0% in 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if any seasonally adjusted unemployment rate (total unemployed, as a percent of the civilian labor force, official unemployment rate denoted as U-3) reported by the Bureau of Labor Statistics in an “Employment Situation Report” for a reference month in 2026 is greater than or equal to the listed percentage. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

The relevant reports for this market are the Employment Situation Reports for January-December, 2026. This market may not resolve to “No” until the Employment Situation report for December 2026 is released. If no Employment Situation Report for December 2026 is released by March 31, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, however, this market will resolve based on all previously published data up to that time. 

The resolution source for this market is the Monthly Employment Situation Report, published by the BLS every month at https://www.bls.gov/bls/news-release/empsit.htm, specifically the U-3 measure in Table A-15 for each month.

Note: the resolution source for this market reports unemployment to one decimal point. Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

eventMetadata.context_description: The U.S. unemployment rate held steady at 4.3% in April 2026 per the Bureau of Labor Statistics' May 8 release, with nonfarm payrolls rising 115,000—surpassing consensus forecasts of around 60,000—signaling labor market resilience despite cooling job gains from prior months. markets.question: Will 50-74 ships transit the Strait of Hormuz between April 27-May 3?
markets.description:

Transit calls include container, dry bulk, roll-on/roll-off, general cargo, and tanker ships. Ships not reported by IMF Portwatch will not be considered.

This market will resolve as soon as data has been published for the final date in the specified period. If no data has been published for the final date of the specified period within 14 calendar days (ET) after the end of that period, this market will resolve based on data published up to that point.

Revisions to previously published data points made within this market’s timeframe will be considered. Revisions to previously published data points after data is published for the final date of the specified period, however, will not be considered.

The resolution source for this market will be IMF Portwatch, specifically the transit calls data published for the Strait of Hormuz at https://portwatch.imf.org/pages/cb5856222a5b4105adc6ee7e880a1730, both in the chart and through downloadable files.

markets.question: Will Trump agree to unfreeze Iranian assets by May 31?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if the United States agrees to unfreeze any Iranian assets by May 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No.”

Unfreezing Iranian assets refers to the release, transfer, or restoration of Iranian access to any assets that are frozen, blocked, or otherwise inaccessible due to U.S. sanctions or restrictions. This includes both assets held in the United States and assets held in foreign jurisdictions where access is restricted due to U.S. sanctions. The removal of sanctions which freeze these assets will also be considered to be unfreezing Iranian assets.

The United States will be considered to have agreed to unfreeze Iranian assets if:
- Donald Trump or another authorized representative of the Government of the United States publicly announces that the United States has agreed to unfreeze any Iranian assets.
- The unfreezing of any Iranian assets is included as part of a treaty or deal that is formally established between the United States and Iran, either through signing or other formal means.

Agreement refers to an explicit acceptance, authorization or consent to the specified action. Only announcements of definitive agreement will qualify. Suggestions, negotiations, expressions of openness, or other non-definitive statements will not qualify.

Any definitive agreement or commitment made before the resolution date will be considered, regardless of when or whether the specified action is begun.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official statements from Donald Trump, the U.S. government, and their official representatives; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used to verify the details of an announcement or formal agreement.

events.title: What Iranian demands will Trump agree to by May 31?
events.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the United States agrees to the continued enrichment of uranium by Iran by May 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No."

Continued enrichment of uranium by Iran refers to US acceptance of the enrichment of, or the right to enrich, any quantity of uranium by Iran for any future amount of time. Agreements that include limitations, restrictions, or specified terms (e.g., caps on enrichment level, monitoring requirements) will qualify, provided the United States accepts continued enrichment.

The United States will be considered to have agreed to the continued enrichment of uranium by Iran if:

- Donald Trump or another authorized representative of the Government of the United States publicly announces that they have definitively agreed to accept the continued enrichment of uranium by Iran.
- Continued enrichment of uranium by Iran is included as part of a treaty or deal that is formally established between the United States and Iran, either through signing or other formal means.

Agreement refers to an explicit acceptance, authorization or consent to the specified action. Only announcements of definitive agreement will qualify. Suggestions, negotiations, expressions of openness, or other non-definitive statements will not qualify.

Any definitive agreement or commitment made before the resolution date will be considered, regardless of when or whether the specified action is begun.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official statements from Donald Trump and the US government and their official representatives; however a consensus of credible reporting may also be used to verify the details of an announcement or formal agreement.

eventMetadata.context_description: Amid ongoing low-level clashes including US interceptions of Iranian attacks in the Strait of Hormuz, Iran is reviewing a recent US peace proposal to formally end the 2026 Iran war, as President Trump demands agreement within days while threatening escalation. Trump stated on May 6 that Tehran wants to negotiate, emphasizing limits on uranium enrichment, reopening the vital shipping lane, and blocking any nuclear weapons path—core US red lines diverging from prior Iranian calls for compensation or sanctions relief. A three-week ceasefire holds tenuously since early May, but mutual accusations persist. Traders assess maximum pressure diplomacy's leverage ahead of Iran's expected response this week and the May 31 deadline, with historical patterns favoring short-term truces over comprehensive pacts.

markets.question: Will Xi Jinping win the Nobel Peace Prize in 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the winner of the 2026 Nobel Peace Prize, as announced by the Norwegian Nobel Committee.

If multiple listed individuals or entities jointly receive the prize, the market will resolve to a single winner. If Donald Trump, Volodymyr Zelenskyy,  Benjamin Netanyahu, Vladimir Putin, or Elon Musk are among the recipients, the market will resolve to the highest-ranked among them in that exact order of precedence. If none of those five are among the winners and the prize is awarded jointly to at least one listed individual and at least one listed organization, the market will resolve in favor of the individual. If no prioritized individuals are among the winners and all listed recipients are of the same type (all individuals or all organizations), the market will resolve to the person whose last name, or the entity’s name, comes first in alphabetical order as listed in this market.

If no official announcement regarding the 2026 Nobel Peace Prize has been made by March 31, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "Other."

The resolution source for this market will be the first official announcement from the Norwegian Nobel Committee.

The resolution source for this market will be the first official announcement from the Norwegian Nobel Committee.

markets.question: Will Jorge Rodríguez be the de facto leader of Venezuela at the end of 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the individual who de facto holds and exercises the powers of the head of state of Venezuela on December 31, 2026 at 12:00 PM ET.

For the purposes of this market, “de facto holds” refers to the individual who exercises primary executive authority over the Venezuelan state at that time, including effective control over the armed forces, national institutions, and core executive decision-making, regardless of formal title, constitutional designation, or international recognition.

Formal appointment, recognition by the United Nations, or recognition by foreign governments is not required.

If more than one individual claims to be head of state, this market will resolve to the individual who demonstrably exercises primary governing control within Venezuela’s territory at the specified time.

If no individual exercises effective governing control at the specified time, this market will resolve to “No Head of State”.

Indicators of de facto authority may include control over the armed forces and security services; control over executive ministries and state administrative institutions; enforcement of national laws; issuance of binding national directives; and effective control over the capital and core state infrastructure.

Symbolic status, foreign recognition without domestic control, nomination without effective authority, or expired prior service will not qualify.

The primary resolution source will be a consensus of credible reporting assessing who exercises effective governing authority at the specified time.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the Qingdao Jiaodong International Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/cn/qingdao/ZSQD.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

markets.question: Will the Fed decrease interest rates by 50+ bps after the September 2026 meeting?
markets.description:
The FED interest rates are defined in this market by the upper bound of the target federal funds range. The decisions on the target federal funds range are made by the Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC) meetings.

This market will resolve to the amount of basis points the upper bound of the target federal funds rate is changed by versus the level it was prior to the Federal Reserve's September 2026 meeting.

If the target federal funds rate is changed to a level not expressed in the displayed options, the change will be rounded up to the nearest 25 and will resolve to the relevant bracket. (e.g. if there's a cut/increase of 12.5 bps it will be considered to be 25 bps)

The resolution source for this market is the FOMC’s statement after its meeting scheduled for September 15-16, 2026 according to the official calendar: https://www.federalreserve.gov/monetarypolicy/fomccalendars.htm.

The level and change of the target federal funds rate is also published at the official website of the Federal Reserve at https://www.federalreserve.gov/monetarypolicy/openmarket.htm.

This market may resolve as soon as the FOMC’s statement for their September meeting with relevant data is issued. If no statement is released by the end date of the next scheduled meeting, this market will resolve to the "No change" bracket.

markets.question: Will Letitia James be arrested before 2027?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the listed individual is arrested by December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

A qualifying arrest/detention includes:
* Being taken into physical custody by law enforcement authorities (including federal, state, local, military, or international law enforcement)
* Voluntarily surrendering to law enforcement authorities in response to an arrest warrant
* Being formally booked or processed following detention
* Being handcuffed by a state authority and taken to a police station
* Surrendering at a police station or courthouse with their attorney
* Being placed under house arrest or electronic monitoring

The following scenarios will NOT qualify as an arrest/detention
* An arrest warrant being issued but not executed
* Being briefly detained but not arrested (e.g. such as in the South Korean judicial system when an individual is awaiting a judge’s decision on whether to grant a detention warrant)
* Being questioned or interviewed without arrest
* Being named in an indictment without arrest

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from the arresting government and law enforcement, however a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

markets.question: Will Trump say "Six Seven" this week?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if Donald Trump mentions the listed term between May 11, 2026, 12:00 AM ET and May 17, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

Plural and possessive forms of the listed term will count toward the resolution of this market regardless of context; however, other forms will NOT count.

Instances where the term is used in a compound word will count regardless of context (e.g. joyful is not a compound word for "joy," however "killjoy" is a compounding of the words "kill" and "joy").

If this market requires a specified number of mentions of a person’s first or last name, a full-name mention will count as one mention (e.g., if a market is about “Joe / Biden 5+ times,” a mention of “Joe Biden” will count once).

A ‘mention’ will include any verbal mention which is recorded (audio or video) and publicly accessible.

Written usages of terms (e.g. Truth Social posts, written statements, etc.) will not count toward this market's resolution.

AI-generated audio or video will not count toward this market's resolution.

Videos posted on his social media which were filmed outside this market's time frame will not qualify for a "Yes" resolution.

markets.question: Map 1: Odd/Even Total Kills?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Odd" if the total combined kills by both teams in Map 1 is an odd number.

This market will resolve to "Even" if the total combined kills by both teams in Map 1 is an even number.

"Total combined kills" includes all kills recorded during the match across all rounds, including kills during regulation rounds and overtime rounds if applicable. Team kills (friendly fire) and self-inflicted deaths (e.g., falling damage, own grenade) do not count as kills for the purposes of this market.

If no kills are recorded in Map 1, or if Map 1 is canceled (not played at all), or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 1 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 1 is not played because the series result has already been determined (e.g., a team clinches the series before Map 1 is needed), this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 1 is remade, resolution will be based on the remade game only.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org. However, if https://hltv.org has not published final results within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: Counter-Strike: Spirit Academy vs Wave Esports (BO3) - Exort Series Main Stage
events.description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike Round 1 match between Spirit Academy and Wave Esports in the Exort Series Main Stage, initially scheduled for April 16 at 11:30AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Spirit Academy" if Spirit Academy win the match against Wave Esports.

This market will resolve to "Wave Esports" if Wave Esports win the match against Spirit Academy.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org. However, if https://hltv.org has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

In cases where a team’s listed name includes minor discrepancies from the resolution source, this market will resolve based on the underlying real-world match rather than exact name matching. Recognizable abbreviations, alternate or erroneous spellings, sponsor tags, affiliate or academy designations, regional identifiers, and minor formatting differences will be treated as referring to the same team, provided the intended team can be clearly and uniquely identified within the relevant competition. If a listed team name has no reasonable connection to any participating team, or if it matches or could reasonably refer to another team in the same competition such that the intended team cannot be unambiguously determined, this market will resolve 50-50.

eventMetadata.context_description: Spirit Academy, Team Spirit's academy squad with a February 2026 roster refresh adding riflers VILBy, mazay, Kiryasoo, kidofpain, and s1nside, holds trader consensus edge in this Exort Series #25 Main Stage BO3 Swiss Round 1 clash against inconsistent Wave Esports. Spirit's recent C-tier form includes top-4 finishes like Exort The Proving Grounds Season 5 and Winline Insight Season 9, showcasing map pool strength on Ancient and Overpass despite no 2026 HLTV records pre-event. Wave enters shaky, relying on stand-ins cMS and pxsl amid 0-3 Swiss exits in qualifiers, vulnerable in pistol and eco rounds. No recent patch alters the meta favoring structured academy play over Wave's aggressive underdog style.

markets.question: Will the highest temperature in Chengdu be 30°C on May 11?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the Chengdu Shuangliu International Airport Station in degrees Celsius on 11 May '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the Chengdu Shuangliu International Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/cn/chengdu/ZUUU.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

markets.question: Will Seattle have between 0.5 and 1 inches of precipitation in May?
markets.description:

If the reported data falls exactly between two brackets, this market will resolve to the higher bracket.

The resolution source for this market measures precipitation to 2 decimal places (e.g., 1.54), thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving this market. eventMetadata.context_description: Lokomotiv Moscow, sitting third in the Russian Premier League table after 27 matches with 48 points, hosts fourth-placed Baltika Kaliningrad (46 points) on May 10 at RZD Arena in a pivotal late-season encounter for Champions League qualification spots. Lokomotiv's recent form shows inconsistency—losses to Krylya Sovetov (0-2) and Spartak Moscow (1-2), offset by a win over Orenburg (1-0)—while Baltika has drawn four straight before a 0-1 defeat to Akron Togliatti, boasting the league's stingiest defense (17 goals conceded). Head-to-head favors Lokomotiv with six wins in 11 meetings and no recent losses to Baltika; Lokomotiv enters at full strength, but Baltika misses winger Eldar Civic to injury. Home advantage and superior goal difference position Lokomotiv as trader consensus favorite amid tight standings.

markets.question: Will the Republicans win the 2028 US Presidential Election?
markets.description:
The 2028 United States presidential election will be held on Tuesday, November 7, 2028.

This market will resolve to the political party whose candidate is elected the next President of the United States in the 2028 election.

The resolution source for this market is the Associated Press, Fox News, and NBC. This market will resolve once all three sources call the race for the same party. If all three sources haven’t called the race for the same party by the inauguration date (January 20, 2029) this market will resolve based on who is inaugurated.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket assigns Democrats a 60.5% implied probability of winning the 2028 US presidential election over Republicans at 38.5%, driven by anticipation of Democratic gains in the 2026 midterms—where markets favor Democrats retaking the House (87%) and Senate (55%). This reflects the historical midterm penalty for the president's party, currently Republicans under President Trump, potentially eroding GOP momentum ahead of the open-seat race with no incumbent advantage. Odds surged to an all-time high near 61% in mid-April amid early national polling averages showing Democrats leading hypothetical matchups and high trading volume on Democratic nominee markets favoring figures like Gavin Newsom. Upcoming 2026 congressional elections remain the pivotal catalyst, with battleground states and turnout dynamics key to shifting probabilities.

markets.question: Abstract FDV above $200M one day after launch?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the Fully Diluted Valuation of Abstract's governance token is greater than the value specified in the title 1 day after launch. Otherwise, the market will resolve to "No."

The token must be actively, publicly transferable and tradable to be considered a launch.

The FDV will be determined using the total token supply multiplied by the token price.

"1 day after launch" is defined as 4:00 PM ET on the calendar day following launch. The resolution source for this market is the most liquid price source available. If Abstract doesn't launch a token by December 31, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "No".

markets.question: Will Germany be the Jury Winner in the Eurovision 2026 Grand Final?
markets.description:
The Grand Final of the Eurovision Song Contest 2026 is scheduled for May 16, 2026.

This market will resolve to the country that receives the highest number of points from the professional juries in the Grand Final of the Eurovision Song Contest 2026.

All ties will be broken according to EBU's official Eurovision rules.

If no winner is announced by July 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "No".

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from Eurovision (https://eurovision.tv/), including live footage of Eurovision 2026, however a consensus of credible reporting will suffice.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket's Eurovision 2026 Jury Winner market reflects a razor-thin race among Australia (Delta Goodrem's soaring ballad "Eclipse"), France (Monroe's elegant "Regarde!"), Denmark (Søren Torpegaard Lund's "Før vi går hjem"), and Finland (Linda Lampenius & Pete Parkkonen's dynamic "Liekinheitin"), with implied probabilities clustered at 19-26%. Recent Eurojury precursor results—Denmark topping the professional jury vote at 213 points, Finland close at 197, Australia third at 184, and France fifth—underscore their sophisticated songcraft and vocal prowess appealing to juries of music industry experts. Ongoing Vienna rehearsals have amplified staging buzz for these entrants, while Finland's overall frontrunner status hints at stronger televote potential. Semifinals on May 12 and 14 could shift momentum before the May 16 final's secret jury tallies.

markets.question: Will Matteo Berrettini win the 2026 Men's French Open?
markets.description:
The 2026 French Open is scheduled for May 18 - June 7, 2026.

This market will resolve to the player that wins the 2026 French Open Men’s Singles Tournament.

If at any point it becomes impossible for a listed player to win the 2026 French Open Men’s Singles Tournament per the rules of the tournament, the corresponding market will resolve to “No”.

If the 2026 French Open Men’s Singles Tournament is cancelled, postponed after July 31, 2026, or there is otherwise no winner declared within that timeframe, this market will resolve to “Other”.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the French Open (https://www.rolandgarros.com/en-us/); however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus heavily favors Jannik Sinner at 70.5% implied probability to win the 2026 French Open on clay at Roland Garros, propelled by his Monte-Carlo Masters 1000 title last month—his first on the surface, defeating Carlos Alcaraz in the final—and a dominant 76-24 lifetime clay record as world No. 1. Alcaraz's late-April withdrawal due to a persistent right wrist injury, sidelining the No. 2-ranked Spaniard and 2024 champion, has cleared a major path, cratering his odds to 0.1%. Alexander Zverev sits second at 6.7% with consistent deep Roland Garros runs and strong clay form as ATP No. 3, while aging Novak Djokovic lags at 3.6% amid reduced schedule intensity. Rising Spaniard Rafael Jodar at 3.4% gains traction from recent Challenger successes and Madrid breakout, boosting French prospects for home hopefuls like Arthur Fils.

eventMetadata.context_description: Alex Fitzpatrick holds a slim lead at 13-under through two holes of the final round at Quail Hollow Club, one stroke ahead of Kristoffer Reitan, with Cameron Young, Sungjae Im, and a chasing pack including Tommy Fleetwood, Rickie Fowler, Nicolai Højgaard, Patrick Cantlay, and Justin Thomas lurking within four strokes for top-10 contention in this no-cut signature event. Pre-tournament withdrawals by Scottie Scheffler, Collin Morikawa, and seven other top players thinned the field, while heavy rain delayed Rounds 1 and 3, softening conditions and favoring aggressive approach play from leaders like Fitzpatrick, whose third-round 64 marked his PGA Tour breakout. Demanding Quail Hollow layout emphasizes tee-to-green prowess and putting under pressure as late groups tee off.

markets.question: Israel x Hezbollah diplomatic meeting by May 31, 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if there is a diplomatic meeting between representatives of Israel and Hezbollah by the listed date, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

A diplomatic meeting refers to a deliberate meeting between representatives of Israel and Hezbollah who are acting in an official capacity and are authorized to engage in negotiation or diplomacy regarding Israel-Hezbollah relations on behalf of their governments/leadership structures. Meetings conducted indirectly, for example, through designated mediators, facilitators, or interlocutors acting with the knowledge and authorization of the relevant governments, will qualify. 

Brief greetings, chance encounters, or talks otherwise not deliberately aimed at diplomacy or negotiation will not count.

The meeting must be in-person (including indirect in-person meetings) and must be publicly acknowledged by either government or reported by a consensus of credible media. Remote meetings, phone calls, or other meetings where the relevant parties are not present will not count.

The resolution sources for this market will be official information from the government of Israel and Hezbollah leadership, and a consensus of credible reporting.

eventMetadata.context_description: Amid ongoing hostilities in southern Lebanon, trader consensus reflects low probabilities for a direct Israel-Hezbollah diplomatic meeting, driven by Hezbollah's explicit rejection of direct negotiations and its absence from U.S.-brokered Israel-Lebanon talks held in Washington in mid-April. Those discussions, the first since 1993, focused on Hezbollah disarmament and peaceful relations but excluded any ceasefire with the group, amid mutual accusations of violations during a fragile April 16 ceasefire—extended three weeks but eroded by recent exchanges, including Israel's May 6 airstrike killing Hezbollah's elite Radwan Force commander in Beirut suburbs and Hezbollah's drone and rocket attacks. Hezbollah signaled openness to indirect talks on May 4, but escalation persists, with no scheduled direct engagement and upcoming delegation-level Israel-Lebanon meetings offering limited prospects for Hezbollah involvement.

markets.question: Al Shabab Saudi Club vs. Al Ittihad Saudi Club: Both Teams to Score
markets.description:
In the upcoming Saudi Professional League game between Al Shabab Saudi Club and Al Ittihad Saudi Club, scheduled for April 10 at 2:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both Al Shabab Saudi Club and Al Ittihad Saudi Club each score at least one goal during the game.

This market will resolve to "No" if either team fails to score (i.e., if one or both teams finish with zero goals).

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on slstat.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: Al Shabab Saudi Club vs. Al Ittihad Saudi Club - More Markets
events.description: More markets for the Saudi Professional League game, scheduled for April 10 at 2:00 PM ET.

eventMetadata.context_description: Al Ittihad sit sixth in the Saudi Pro League table with 42 points from 26 matches, but their recent form has faltered with just one win in the last five games (1W-2D-2L), exacerbated by the winter departures of stars Karim Benzema to Al Hilal and N'Golo Kanté, leaving gaps in attack and midfield amid fan frustration ahead of a King's Cup semi-final. Al Shabab, 12th on 29 points, host at SHG Arena on April 10 showing sharper scoring edge lately (three wins in five, 12 goals), buoyed by home strength despite mid-table position and forward Mohammed Harbush sidelined long-term with a cruciate injury. Al Ittihad hold a strong head-to-head edge, unbeaten in the last five meetings, setting up a competitive Riyadh clash influenced by rest advantages and tactical adjustments.

markets.question: Will David Njoku play for Indianapolis Colts in 2026-27?

If David Njoku joins a team that is not listed, this market will resolve to “Other”.

If David Njoku is released, retires, or is not under contract with any professional team by August 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to “Other”.

The primary resolution sources for this market will be official announcements from the NFL and/or the acquiring team. A consensus of credible media reporting may also be used to resolve the market.

Njoku, who announced via Instagram in February that he won't return to the Cleveland Browns after nine seasons—ending at just 24.5%—remains unsigned post-2026 NFL Draft, fueling interest from TE-needy teams like the Washington Commanders (48.9%), Philadelphia Eagles (48.8%), and Cincinnati Bengals (48.5%) based on roster gaps and prior rumors, though no other visits have matched the Chargers' momentum.

markets.question: Will the Republican Party win the PA-01 House seat?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the party of the candidate who wins the PA-01 congressional district seat in the U.S. House of Representatives in the 2026 midterm elections. The midterm elections will take place on November 4, 2026.

​​A candidate's party will be determined by their ballot-listed or otherwise identifiable affiliation with that party at the time all of the 2026 House elections are conclusively called by this market's resolution sources. A candidate without a ballot-listed affiliation to either the Democrat or Republican parties will be considered a member of one of these parties based on the party with which they most recently expressed their intent to caucus at the time all of the House elections are conclusively called by this market's resolution sources.

This market will resolve based on the result of the election as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based solely on the official results as reported by the United States government, specifically the Federal Election Commission (https://www.fec.gov/).

Trader consensus at 44.5% Democrats and 44% Republicans reflects balanced fundamentals; separation could stem from Harvie's primary outcome, fresh polls, or national midterm trends.

markets.question: Will Renan Santos finish in second place in the first round of the 2026 Brazilian presidential election?
markets.description:
A presidential election is scheduled to take place in Brazil on October 4, 2026.

This market will resolve according to the listed candidate who receives the second-most valid votes in the first round of this election.

The named candidates will be primarily ranked by the number of valid votes received in the specified election. If two or more candidates are tied on valid votes, ties will be broken by alphabetical order of the candidates' last names. This market will resolve to the candidate that occupies the second-highest finishing position after applying this ranking.

If the result of this election isn't known definitively by June 30, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, the market will resolve to "Other".

This market will resolve based on the result of the election, as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based solely on the official results as reported by the Brazilian government, specifically the Superior Electoral Court (Tribunal Superior Eleitoral, TSE) (e.g., https://dadosabertos.tse.jus.br/).

markets.question: Total Kills Over/Under 62.5 in Game 2?
markets.description:
In the upcoming match between Nigma Galaxy and REKONIX in the 1win Essence Group B, initially scheduled for May 2 at 2:30PM ET:

This market is about the total kills in Game 2.

This market will resolve to "Over" if the total kills in Game 2 is 63 or more. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under".

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 begins but is not completed, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 is remade, resolution will be based on the total kills in the remade game only.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://www.dotabuff.com. However, if https://www.dotabuff.com has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.


In Dota 2, a "kill" for markets like team total kills, kill handicap, and interval kills is counted when an enemy hero dies and the game awards a hero kill event to the opposing team's score, which is the number shown on the in-game scoreboard and tracked in scoreboard feeds as team kills. In practical terms, this includes any enemy hero death that increments a team's kill score, regardless of who got the last hit, including situations where the victim dies to creeps, a tower, or neutrals as long as the kill is still credited to the enemy team. It does not include denies, such as killing your own allied units, and it also does not include building or objective destructions like towers, barracks, or Roshan, since those are tracked separately from kills. Assists also do not count as kills, because they are recorded as a separate player stat and multiple players can assist on a single kill.

events.title: Dota 2: Nigma Galaxy vs REKONIX (BO3) - 1win Essence Group B
events.description:
This market refers to the Dota 2 match between Nigma Galaxy and REKONIX in the 1win Essence Group B, initially scheduled for May 2 at 2:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to "Nigma Galaxy" if Nigma Galaxy win the match against REKONIX.

This market will resolve to "REKONIX" if REKONIX win the match against Nigma Galaxy.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://www.dotabuff.com. However, if https://www.dotabuff.com has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

Bublik's clay experience from a Monte-Carlo quarterfinal tempers Tien's breakout momentum from Indian Wells quarters and Delray semis.

markets.question: Will Liberal Alliance be part of the next Government of Denmark?
markets.description:
A Parliamentary election is scheduled to be held in Denmark on March 24, 2026.

This market will resolve to “Yes” if the listed political party is included in the first Danish government formed after the 2026 Danish parliamentary election. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

This market may resolve once the first government is officially confirmed following the appointment of the Prime Minister and ministers by the monarch after the 2026 Danish parliamentary election, with ministers sworn in under non-caretaker circumstances.

A party will only be considered part of the government if it participates in the governing coalition and provides at least one cabinet minister. Parties that merely support the government from outside the cabinet (e.g., through parliamentary support agreements or similar arrangements) without holding a cabinet post will not qualify.

If no government is formed, or the results are not known definitively by January 31, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to “No”.

This market will resolve based on a consensus of credible reporting. In case of ambiguity, this market will resolve based on official information from the Government of Denmark.

Caretaker Frederiksen's coalition talks collapsed on May 8, prompting King Frederik X to task Liberal Party (Venstre) leader Troels Lund Poulsen with forming a potential center-right government involving Moderates, Conservatives, and others. Fragmented results necessitate multi-party coalition negotiations, with welfare agreement reconfirmations aiding progress but policy sticking points on immigration and economy persisting. Traders watch for breakthroughs or renewed deadlock ahead of a possible minority government resolution.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket overwhelmingly favors a lowest temperature of 50-51°F in New York City on May 10 (99.7% implied probability), driven by official National Weather Service observations from the ASOS station at Central Park, which recorded the daily minimum around 51°F shortly after 4 a.m. EDT amid light winds and partial cloud cover that limited radiative cooling overnight. Daytime solar heating has since pushed temperatures into the mid-60s°F, with urban heat island effects in NYC preventing any further drop, aligning pre-event GFS and ECMWF model guidance showing lows in the low 50s°F. Resolution is near-certain barring rare data revisions from NOAA; only an unprecedented measurement anomaly could shift this, as historical May 10 lows average near 55°F but today's synoptic pattern—high pressure ridge and mild advection—supports the observed outcome. Final daily climate summary expected later today.

markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the team that wins the 2026 MLS Cup. 

If at any point it becomes impossible for a listed team to win the 2026 MLS Cup per the rules of MLS (e.g. they are mathematically eliminated), the corresponding market will resolve to “No”.

If the 2026 MLS season is cancelled, postponed after December 31, 2026 ET, or there is otherwise no winner declared within that timeframe, this market will resolve to “Other”.

The primary resolution source will be official information from Major League Soccer; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Defending MLS Cup champions Inter Miami CF lead trader consensus at 17.5% implied probability, fueled by Lionel Messi's hot start with 10 goals and 3 assists through 13 matches despite an opening 0-3 loss to LAFC, positioning them as Eastern Conference runners-up amid recent wins over Orlando City and Toronto FC. Vancouver Whitecaps top recent power rankings and Supporters' Shield standings with an unbeaten streak and league-leading form, earning 10.8%, while LAFC's strong Western Conference play and early dominance over Miami hold them at 11.5%. Nashville SC's Eastern table lead and San Jose Earthquakes' surge keep the race tight, highlighting early-season parity, balanced conferences, and no clear playoff path yet after 10-12 matchdays.

markets.question: Will Pope Leo XIV publish his encyclical by May 15?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if Pope Leo XIV publishes his encyclical by May 15, 2026, 11:59PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

For a letter to qualify it must be commonly understood as an encyclical or declared as an encyclical upon release. Other forms of papal brief, such as a papal bull, will not qualify. 

The resolution source for this market will be information from Pope Leo XIV, official information from the Catholic Church, or a consensus of credible reporting.

events.title: Will Pope Leo XIV publish his encyclical by May 15?
events.description:

For a letter to qualify it must be commonly understood as an encyclical or declared as an encyclical upon release. Other forms of papal brief, such as a papal bull, will not qualify. 

The resolution source for this market will be information from Pope Leo XIV, official information from the Catholic Church, or a consensus of credible reporting.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket reflects skepticism toward unconfirmed Vatican reports, pricing a 60.5% implied probability against Pope Leo XIV publishing his first encyclical by May 15. While leaks from Rome last week—citing KNA and Catholic Herald sources—suggested a signing date coinciding with the 135th anniversary of Leo XIII's Rerum Novarum, focusing on AI ethics and global disorder, no official announcement emerged during the pope's May 8 election anniversary events in Naples and Pompeii. This first major encyclical, distinct from his October 2025 apostolic exhortation Dilexi Te, remains speculative amid the Vatican's deliberate pace under the new American pontiff, with traders eyeing potential delays typical in papal document preparation. Resolution hinges on Vatican confirmation before midnight May 15.

markets.question: Will Victor Wembanyama win the 2026 Western Conference Finals MVP?

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus heavily favors Shai Gilgeous-Alexander at 63.5% implied probability for Western Conference Finals MVP, driven by the Thunder's 3-0 series lead over the Lakers after a dominant 131-108 Game 3 win on May 9, where SGA posted 23 points and nine assists alongside Chet Holmgren's contributions. His playoff averages of 30.6 points, 7.6 assists reflect consistent dominance since sweeping the Suns in the first round, positioning OKC as clear favorites to advance against likely opponent San Antonio. Victor Wembanyama's 30% share stems from his explosive 39 points, 15 rebounds, and five blocks on 72% shooting in the Spurs' 115-108 Game 3 victory over Minnesota (now trailing 2-1), matching historic big-man feats amid Anthony Edwards' 32-point effort. Edwards at 3.3% captures Timberwolves' slim upset path despite DiVincenzo's absence. Minimal injuries bolster star-driven matchups.

markets.question: Angers SCO vs. RC Strasbourg Alsace: O/U 4.5
markets.description:
In the upcoming Ligue 1 game between Angers SCO and RC Strasbourg Alsace, scheduled for May 10 at 3:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if Angers SCO and RC Strasbourg Alsace combine to score 5 or more goals in this game.

If the combined total is less than 5, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on ligue1.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: Angers SCO vs. RC Strasbourg Alsace - More Markets
events.description: More markets for the Ligue 1 game, scheduled for May 10 at 3:00 PM ET.

eventMetadata.context_description: RC Strasbourg Alsace hold an advantageous position in the Ligue 1 table around 8th with 46 points from 30 matches, fueled by a dramatic 3-2 injury-time comeback victory at Lorient on April 26 that highlights their resilience amid a mixed run including losses to Rennes and Nice. Angers SCO, mired in 13th on 34 points from 31 games, struggle with poor recent form—drawing 1-1 versus Le Havre, losing 0-3 to PSG, and conceding heavily to Rennes and Lens—exacerbated by key injuries to Carlens Arcus (groin), Djibirin Harouna (ankle), and Yassin Belkhdim (arm). Strasbourg dominated earlier this season 5-0 at home, though Angers benefit from Stade Raymond Kopa home advantage and potential rest before matchday 33 on May 10. Trader consensus reflects Strasbourg's superior standing, momentum, and squad depth despite their own absences like Emanuel Emegha (muscle tear).

events.title: 1. FC Union Berlin vs. FC Augsburg
events.description: This event is for the upcoming Bundesliga game, scheduled for Saturday, May 16, 2026 between 1. FC Union Berlin and FC Augsburg.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus prices all outcomes at even money, capturing the razor-thin margins in this Bundesliga clash at An der alten Försterei, where Union Berlin's staunch home record tempers FC Augsburg's hot streak. Union sit 13th after a winless run in six matches—three draws, three losses, including a gritty 2-2 versus Köln and 1-1 with St. Pauli—but they've netted consistently without clean sheets. Augsburg, 9th in the table, boast five unbeaten games (three wins, two draws), scoring nine goals yet failing to keep a clean sheet in eight, vulnerable away. Mutual injury woes, like Union's absent goalkeeper Frederik Rønnow (thigh) and Robert Skov (calf), plus Augsburg's Mads Pedersen sidelined, alongside a balanced head-to-head history, keep probabilities tightly contested heading into matchday 34.

markets.question: Will Anže Logar be the next Prime Minister of Slovenia?
markets.description:
Parliamentary elections are scheduled to be held in Slovenia on March 22, 2026.

This market will resolve to the next individual who is officially elected by the National Assembly (Državni zbor) and sworn in as Prime Minister of Slovenia following the next parliamentary election.

To count for resolution, the individual must be formally sworn in. Any interim or caretaker Prime Minister will not count toward the resolution of this market.

If no such Prime Minister is sworn in by December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to “Other”.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from the Government of Slovenia; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Following Slovenia's razor-close March 22 parliamentary election, where no party secured a National Assembly majority, outgoing Prime Minister Robert Golob's Freedom Movement failed to forge a coalition and conceded on April 20, shifting momentum to Janez Janša's Slovenian Democratic Party (SDS) and centre-right allies. President Nataša Pirc Musar skipped nominating a prime minister-designate after first-round consultations on April 25, prompting a second round where Janša announced on May 5 that coalition partners agreed on key program points, with details expected within a week ahead of an imminent confidence vote. Trader consensus at 92% implied probability underscores the right bloc's easier path to 46 seats via partners like New Slovenia (NSi), though negotiation breakdowns, partner defections, or a failed investiture could trigger snap elections or an alternative nominee.

markets.question: Will Chad Bianco finish first in the 2026 California Governor primary election?
markets.description:
The non-partisan primary election for Governor of California is scheduled to take place on June 2, 2026. The top two candidates in this election by number of votes won will advance to the general election for Governor of California.

This market will resolve according to the candidate who receives the most valid votes in this primary election.

The named candidates will be primarily ranked by the number of valid votes received in the specified election. If two or more candidates are tied on valid votes, ties will be broken by alphabetical order of the candidates' last names. This market will resolve to the candidate that occupies the highest finishing position after applying this ranking.

If the results of this election are not definitively known by December 31, 2026, this market will resolve to “Other.”

This market will resolve based on the results of the primary election for Governor of California as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based solely on the official results as reported by the government of California, specifically the Office of the Secretary of State.

markets.question: Will the highest temperature in Singapore be 27°C on May 12?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the Singapore Changi Airport Station in degrees Celsius on 12 May '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the Singapore Changi Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/sg/singapore/WSSS.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket clusters around 31–33°C for Singapore's highest temperature on May 12, reflecting the National Environment Agency's (NEA) latest fortnightly outlook for 1–15 May 2026, which anticipates daily maxima of 33–35°C under inter-monsoon conditions with light winds and frequent afternoon thundery showers. These showers introduce key uncertainty, as early convection can suppress peaks via cloud cover and evaporative cooling, favoring 31–32°C, while delayed or lighter rain allows stronger solar heating to push toward 33°C amid May's climatological average high of 31°C and urban heat island effects. Recent days, including a 33°C peak on May 10, support this tight range; watch NEA's daily updates tomorrow for refined model guidance on shower timing and intensity.

markets.question: Will Trump say "Darth Vader" in May?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if Donald Trump mentions the listed term between May 1, 2026, 12:00 AM ET and May 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

Plural and possessive forms of the listed term will count toward the resolution of this market regardless of context; however, other forms will NOT count.

Instances where the term is used in a compound word will count regardless of context (e.g. joyful is not a compound word for "joy," however "killjoy" is a compounding of the words "kill" and "joy").

If this market requires a specified number of mentions of a person’s first or last name, a full-name mention will count as one mention (e.g., if a market is about “Joe / Biden 5+ times,” a mention of “Joe Biden” will count once).

A ‘mention’ will include any verbal mention which is recorded (audio or video) and publicly accessible.

Written usages of terms (e.g. Truth Social posts, written statements, etc.) will not count toward this market's resolution.

AI-generated audio or video will not count toward this market's resolution.

Videos posted on his social media which were filmed outside this market's time frame will not qualify for a "Yes" resolution.

Geopolitical catalysts, including allied strikes degrading Iranian missile capabilities and energy market volatility, underscore his rhetorical emphasis on foreign policy risks, while domestic priorities offer paths for other outcomes.

Recent intense canvassing across urban, rural, and island areas, highlighted in reports from the past 48 hours, emphasizes housing shortages, cost-of-living pressures, and infrastructure like ring roads, where Thomas's local councillor profile and appeals for small-business relief position him for potential transfers from fellow independents like Cubbard or Thomas Welby, though polls flag his relative transfer weakness in Galway city.

markets.question: Nvidia Data Center Revenue above 50B in Q1?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if Nvidia’s data center revenue for the first fiscal quarter of 2027, as reported in its official company earnings materials, is above the listed amount. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.
The specified metric will be considered as reported in the company’s official earnings materials. Subsequent revisions will not be considered.

If the specified company’s official earnings materials for the specified quarter are released, and the specified metric is not included, this market will resolve to “No”. 
 
If the specified company does not release quarterly earnings materials for the specified quarter by July 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to “No”.

If the specified metric is reported as a range rather than a specific number, the midpoint of the range will be used for resolution of this market. 

The resolution source for this market is Nvidia’s official company earnings materials, including press releases, investor presentations, and regulatory filings. If the specified metric is not reported in these materials, recordings or transcripts of the company’s earnings webcast may also be used.

Note: This market will resolve based on the most numerically precise version of the specified metric reported in the company’s official earnings materials. Only the specified metric will be considered; alternate versions that differ in definition or scope from the specified metric will not be considered.

markets.question: Will Google have the #2 AI model at the end of June 2026 (Style Control On)?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the company that owns the model that has the second-highest arena rank (Style Control On) based on the Chatbot Arena LLM Leaderboard (https://lmarena.ai/) when the table under the "Leaderboard" tab is checked on June 30, 2026, 12:00 PM ET.

Results from the "Rank" column under the "Text Arena | Overall" Leaderboard tab at https://lmarena.ai/leaderboard/text with style control on will be used to resolve this market.

Models will be ordered primarily by their leaderboard rank at the market’s check time. If two or more models are tied on rank, they will be ordered by their Arena score, including any underlying, unrounded, granular values reflected in the data below the leaderboard. If a tie remains, alphabetical order of company names as listed in this market group will be used as a final tiebreaker (e.g., if the two models are tied by exact arena score, “Google” would be ranked ahead of “xAI”). This market will resolve based on the company that occupies second place under this ranking system.

The resolution source for this market is the Chatbot Arena LLM Leaderboard found at https://lmarena.ai/. If this resolution source is unavailable at check time, this market will remain open until the leaderboard comes back online and will resolve based on the first check after it becomes available. If it becomes permanently unavailable, this market will resolve based on another resolution source.

events.description:
This market will resolve according to the company that owns the model that has the second-highest arena rank (Style Control On) based on the Chatbot Arena LLM Leaderboard (https://lmarena.ai/) when the table under the "Leaderboard" tab is checked on June 30, 2026, 12:00 PM ET.

Results from the "Rank" column under the "Text Arena | Overall" Leaderboard tab at https://lmarena.ai/leaderboard/text with style control on will be used to resolve this market.

Models will be ordered primarily by their leaderboard rank at the market’s check time. If two or more models are tied on rank, they will be ordered by their Arena score, including any underlying, unrounded, granular values reflected in the data below the leaderboard. If a tie remains, alphabetical order of company names as listed in this market group will be used as a final tiebreaker (e.g., if the two models are tied by exact arena score, “Google” would be ranked ahead of “xAI”). This market will resolve based on the company that occupies second place under this ranking system.

The resolution source for this market is the Chatbot Arena LLM Leaderboard found at https://lmarena.ai/. If this resolution source is unavailable at check time, this market will remain open until the leaderboard comes back online and will resolve based on the first check after it becomes available. If it becomes permanently unavailable, this market will resolve based on another resolution source.

markets.question: Will there be no Somaliland parliamentary election before 2027?
markets.description:
Parliamentary elections are to be scheduled to be held in Somaliland in late March 2026.

This market will resolve according to the political party that wins the greatest number of seats in the next Somaliland House of Representatives (Golaha Wakiilada) election. 

If no election takes place by December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "No election before 2027".

If an election takes place but the results are not known definitively by December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will remain open until the certified results are released. If the results are not known definitively by March 31, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "Other".

In the event of a tie between multiple parties for the most seats won, this market will resolve in favor of the party that received a greater number of valid votes. In the event that results in a tie, this market will resolve in favor of the party or coalition whose listed abbreviation appears first in alphabetical order.

This market's resolution will be based solely on the number of seats won by the named party in the Somaliland Parliament. 

This market will resolve based on the results of this election as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based solely on the official results as reported by the Somaliland government, specifically the Somaliland National Electoral Commission (Komishanka Doorashooyinka Qaranka) (slnec.net).

eventMetadata.context_description: Somaliland's House of Elders (Guurti) approved a 27-month extension on April 28 for House of Representatives and local council terms, overriding the National Electoral Commission's 10-month postponement recommendation amid voter registration delays and logistical hurdles, pushing parliamentary elections beyond 2027 and driving trader consensus to 78.5% on no vote before then. Criticism from opposition parties like KAAH—blaming Waddani government and Kulmiye infighting—civil society, and international partners including the UK has mounted over transparency lapses and democratic backsliding risks. Among parties, Waddani leads at 31.5% implied probability, buoyed by President Cirro's 2024 presidential win and incumbency edge, while Kulmiye trails at 1.6% and UCID at 5.1%, reflecting uncertain multi-party dynamics if elections proceed.

markets.question: Will the highest temperature in Denver be between 58-59°F on May 12?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the Buckley Space Force Base Station in degrees Fahrenheit on 12 May '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the Buckley Space Force Base Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/us/co/aurora/KBKF.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Fahrenheit (eg, 21°F). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket overwhelmingly favors a high temperature of 60°F or higher in Denver on May 12, with 99.3% implied probability, driven by National Weather Service (NWS) forecast models showing consensus highs near 70°F under a persistent upper-level ridge over the central Rockies. This high-pressure system promotes clear skies, light winds, and above-normal temperatures, aligning with May 12 climatological normals of 69°F from 1991–2020 NWS data, where sub-60°F highs are rare (occurring in fewer than 1% of historical days). Recent developments include mostly sunny conditions with 70–82°F highs in the past 48 hours, and no modeled cold fronts or precipitation threats through mid-week. Realistic challenges include an unforeseen influx of cooler Pacific air or increased cloud cover, though ensemble models like GFS and ECMWF show minimal disagreement; watch NWS updates Sunday for refined guidance ahead of resolution based on official Denver International Airport observations.

markets.question: Spread: Toulouse FC (-2.5)
markets.description:
In the upcoming Ligue 1 game, scheduled for May 10 at 3:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Toulouse FC" if Toulouse FC win the game by 3 or more goals.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Olympique Lyonnais".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

This market will resolve according to the official final score published on ligue1.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: Toulouse FC vs. Olympique Lyonnais - More Markets
events.description: More markets for the Ligue 1 game, scheduled for May 10 at 3:00 PM ET.

eventMetadata.context_description: Olympique Lyonnais sit third in the Ligue 1 table with 57 points from 31 matches, riding a strong run including a 2-1 upset win at PSG on April 19 and a 2-0 victory over Lorient on April 12, bolstering their Champions League push. Toulouse languish in 10th on 38 points from 31 games, mired in a slump with recent defeats like 0-4 to Lille on April 12, 0-1 to Monaco on April 25, and ongoing attacking injuries to Rafik Messali (ankle) and Frank Magri (knee). Lyon's defensive solidity (just 32 goals conceded) contrasts Toulouse's home struggles, though key absences like Corentin Tolisso (adductor) and Pavel Sulc (knee) could test their depth ahead of this late-season Stadium de Toulouse clash.
